steps: Drill the bottom of a 0. 6 mL microcentrifuge tube with the aid of a needle
Extract the band of expected size extracted from the gel
Transfer the gel band into a 0. 6 mL perforated microcentrifuge tube
Place the 0. 6 mL microcentrifuge tube into a 1.5 ml microcentrifuge tube
Centrifuge at 14000 x g for 1 min
Store in the freezer in the next day.
creator: Izabela M Rezende
